_doc: BRD §4.8 monotonic-improvement policy. Consumed by hooks/experiment-logger.js. Edit to change the default keep/revert behavior.
_policy_options: revert-on-any-regression  -- DEFAULT. Any dimension regressing by more than its tolerance triggers a revert recommendation.
keep-on-any-improvement   -- Keep if at least one dimension improved, even if another regressed (within tolerance).
